text.title: Vendor Evaluation Scorecard for AI Tooling Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Vendor A wins on quality + cost; team ignores security; PII leak in prod 3 months later.
antipattern.root-cause: No weights set; team summed raw scores.
antipattern.fix: Set weights pre-scoring; security weight ≥ 25% for AI tooling default.

antipattern.symptom: Cost cell quotes vendor's marketing page; actual bill 3x higher.
antipattern.root-cause: No cross-check against benchmarks or peer reports.

antipattern.symptom: Cheap vendor wins; migration off them estimated at 4 engineer-months never quantified upfront.
antipattern.root-cause: Lock-in scored as 'low' without exit-cost number.
antipattern.fix: Compute exit-cost in eng-days + data migration; include in lock-in score.
